privileged_info_summary: The task explicitly requires the creation of a synthetic exam configuration named 'Engineering Basics - DEBUG' with the Quit Password set to 'logcheck!23', the 'Show Quit Button' enabled, and the Log Level set to 'Debug'. These values are confirmed by the task description and verifier scripts.
